subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. 1916 in Abu Sinan
subcodes.first_line: One day in Baghdad He called all His friends together and spoke to them of God. Then He departed from them alone. Nobody knew just where He was.
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as educator, @predictions and prophecies, @power of the Manifestation of God, @banishments of Baha'u'llah, @suffering and imprisonment, @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals, @growth of the Cause
